added.+80oNL: Confirm your age on another device

added.KD6MH5: Same perks you love. Just billed once a year.

added.Tg0fDm: Let members represent your server everywhere on Discord with a custom tag next to their name.

3EQnkg.new_value: Treat your friends, and yourself. Send a gift and unlock a profile badge that levels up the more you give.
3EQnkg.old_value: Treat your friends, and yourself. Send a gift and earn a profile badge that evolves the more you give.

4Yp0mI.new_value: Your badge progresses as you gift. Exceptions include when a gift is refunded or when fraud is detected.
4Yp0mI.old_value: This badge evolves the more you gift. Refunds and fraud flags may adjust your progress.

6GaRTu.new_value: Laws in your region require teens ages 13–16 to have a connected guardian. Share the link below to connect with a parent or guardian. [Learn more]({link})
6GaRTu.old_value: Laws in your region require teens ages 13–16 to have a connected guardian. Share the code below to connect. [Learn more]({link})

AcJ4ke.old_value: Choose times your teen cannot use Discord

Ke+kz5.old_value: Laws in your region require teens ages 13–16 to have a connected guardian. You have {pendingCount}. [Learn more]({link})
